overrideJustification: Orchestrator override after direct code verification. 4/5 blocking issues are false positives: (1) gist targeting already uses -f vibogit-beacon.json via SYNC_BEACON_FILENAME constant, (2) machine_name_from_config fallback never reached because frontend always sends name, (3) GitStatus missing fields is irrelevant since beacon uses ProjectStatus which has the fields, (4) Copy button intentionally copies saved/validated gist ID. The 5th issue (same-name machine filtering) is a minor edge case tracked but not blocking - users would have to manually configure identical machine names.

blockingIssues.description: apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands.rs:853 machine_name_from_config does not fall back to the saved computer_name, so users without a beacon-specific name can publish an unexpected hostname or "Unknown Machine" instead of their configured machine label.

apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/commands.rs:1154 gist read/validate/update flows parse `gh gist view <id> --raw` without targeting `vibogit-beacon.json`, so multi-file gists can return malformed content and break sync operations.

packages/ui/src/lib/sync-beacon-context.tsx:95 filters remote machines solely by the configured machine name string, so two distinct machines with the same name cause legitimate remote entries to disappear from the beacon panel.

packages/shared/src/types.ts:75 still omits `lastCommitHash`, `lastCommitMessage`, and `lastCommitTimestamp` from the shared GitStatus contract, leaving sync beacon commit metadata dependent on an unsafe local cast instead of the typed status pipeline.

packages/ui/src/components/settings/sections/SyncBeaconSettingsSection.tsx:131 copies `config.syncBeaconGistId` instead of the editable `gistIdInput`, so the new always-visible Copy action can share a stale Gist ID after the user edits the field to join another beacon.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify in the tauri-fullstack skill that browser verification is optional for backend-only Rust features when no user-facing web surface changed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The sync-beacon-backend review noted the worker had to deviate from the skill because the feature only touched Rust Tauri commands and had no browser-verifiable surface.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document that Sync Beacon status identity currently depends on configurable machine names.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because the reviews show this is an active product bug rather than stable architecture knowledge; it should be fixed, not documented as accepted behavior.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add architecture docs for the sync beacon commit-metadata pipeline.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because the current round identified blocking implementation gaps in that pipeline, so documenting it now would prematurely codify behavior that still needs fixes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document that ProjectStatus is declared in packages/ui/src/lib/projects-context.tsx.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because this is a narrow code-location note and not strong enough shared-state knowledge to add to library guidance on its own.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission docs should mention `gh gist view -f vibogit-beacon.json` for multi-file gists.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected for now because the underlying code is still failing scrutiny; the orchestrator can decide whether broader mission guidance should change after the product fix lands.
